svg.title: Fail-mode decision analysis for Petasos
svg.desc: Three-option comparison: fail-open, fail-closed, and degraded, with trade-offs for each
svg.text: Fail-Mode Decision: What happens when a scanner errors at runtime?
Default: degraded. Configurable to open or closed via fail_mode config field.
Syntactic pre-filter (MinimalScanner) always runs — it has no deps to fail. So "all scanners fail"
means "all ML scanners fail" — the regex baseline still catches the obvious patterns.
